title: IMC SimplifyGeometry Optimization
body_tail:
8e0fd4/ef96f795) and produced no new submit candidate. Current best remains 81.938904; target remains 91.80+. Latest candidate 23e4eaf87c6d scored only 18.01737.

Do not return any known bad family: c0ac4689, 5131d2d, 2cb2e4a, 655c8d73, d0ddc216, 23e4eaf, 579eb162, 173e27a5, 158e0fd4, ef96f795, c2ed8693/b59182a/b4922b5, 770fc3ab/5a9f6be.

Your next answer must be exactly one complete standalone C++17 source in a single 
cpp block. No Python, no generator, no old snippets, no prose. It must compile with -O2 -std=c++17 and pass the sample first line exactly `8 12`. Think bigger: we need a structural route to +10 score, not a tiny tweak.

Show more


Thought for 5m 27s
I






Round23 feedback: duplicate again; no new C++ candidate. The generated tab3 submissions 19906235 and 19906236 both tied current best at 81.938904, so MVI92/VGC92-style current-best wrappers still do not break the plateau. Candidate 19906248 is pending.

Current best remains 81.938904; target 91.80+. Do not repeat old families/fragments: c0ac, 5131, 2cb2, 655c, d0dd, 23e4, 579e, 173e, 158e/ef96, c2ed/b591/b492, 770f/5a9f, or MVI/VGC/K3C wrappers unless you make a genuinely different C++ final source.

Return exactly one complete standalone C++17 source in a single 
cpp block. No Python/generator-only/snippets/prose. It must compile -O2 -std=c++17 and pass sample first line `8 12`. We need a true +10 route.

Show more


Thought for 7m 14s
I



Pro Extended



ChatGPT can make mistakes. Check important info.

g++ -std=c++17 -O2 -pipe -static -s mvde_submit.cpp -o mvde_submit
./mvde_submit < sample.in | head -1
# expected: 8 12
